name: Roger Dassen
background: Roger Dassen was appointed as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer in 2018. Before joining ASML, he was the CEO of Deloitte Netherlands and served as a member of the Global Board of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu Limited.

commpanies.name: ASML Holding N.V.
commpanies.title_or_role: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
